Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class RelatedRecordAssocCriteria

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.RelatedRecordAssocCriteria
public class RelatedRecordAssocCriteria extends Metadata

Java class for RelatedRecordAssocCriteria complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="RelatedRecordAssocCriteria">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="associationHandlerApexClass" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="associationType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}AssociationType"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="eventType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}AssociationEventType"/>
         <element name="isProtected" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="preCondition" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="referenceObject" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="selectedOwnerField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="status" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}AssociationStatusType"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
